sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13898" key="a)postupa/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποστῠπάζω</orth>, <sense id="n13898.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drive off with blows,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:127" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">127</biblScope></bibl>. (Cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στύπος.</foreign>)</sense> </entryFree>
